title: '£7m tax bill for William' and 'Traitors take their places'
description: The Prince of Wales's income tax bill revealed and Celebrity Traitors returns leads Sunday's papers.

title: King's speech was a 'high stakes' moment of US visit, Palace says
description: The state visit to the US draws a positive response after what was a difficult diplomatic challenge.
content:
King Charles III's speech to the US Congress last week was a "high stakes" moment, a senior royal aide has said, but one that stayed true to the monarch's personal "conscience".

title: Miami Grand Prix brought forward by three hours because of thunderstorms threat
description: Sunday's Miami Grand Prix is moved forward by three hours to 18:00 BST because of the threat of thunderstorms.
content:
The Miami Grand Prix has been moved forward by three hours to 18:00 BST (13:00 local time) because of the threat of thunderstorms.

title: Red light therapy: Can infrared help you recover after a workout?
description: Whether it can really repair muscles and make skin look younger is up for debate.
content:
At first glance, it reminds me of a tanning bed I used to cook myself on as a naive teenager (which I heartily do not recommend). But I'm reassured I won't be turning a crisp brown.

title: Man charged over bomb hoax after Peter Kay show evacuated
description: Arena in Birmingham cleared after report of suspicious bag, with comedian pulled from stage mid-performance
content:
A man has been charged over a bomb hoax after a live show by comedian Peter Kay in Birmingham was stopped when a “potentially suspicious bag” was found around the venue.
